scripts.test:unit: node --test --test-name-pattern="publication clock|draft and missing|location eligibility|location-service eligibility|sitemap normalisation|location sitemap|private" tests/publication-controls.test.js
scripts.test:integration: node --test --test-name-pattern="server insight query|ineligible direct routes|location catalogue" tests/publication-controls.test.js
scripts.typecheck: node --check server/publication-eligibility.js && node --check api/lib/supabase.js && node --check api/lib/location-catalogue.js && node --check api/lib/content-renderer.js && node --check api/lib/schema/index.js && node --check api/content-page.js && node --check api/indexnow.js && node --check api/indexnow-key.js && node --check api/sitemap.js && node --check scripts/inject-analytics.js && node --check scripts/monitor-seo-endpoints.js && node --check scripts/seo-release-quality.js && node --check scripts/verify-publication-controls.js && node --check scripts/verify-service-evidence-integrity.js && node --check scripts/verify-case-study-evidence-gate.js && node --check scripts/verify-service-template-consolidation.js && node --check scripts/verify-jam-remediation.js && esbuild frontend/assets/js/cms.js frontend/assets/js/analytics-events.js frontend/assets/js/menu-state-preserver.js frontend/assets/js/pages/contact.js frontend/assets/js/pages/service-detail.js frontend/assets/js/pages/industry-detail.js frontend/assets/js/pages/case-study-detail.js frontend/assets/js/pages/insights-post.js --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --external:https://* --outdir=/tmp/xtradite-publication-typecheck --log-level=error
scripts.verify: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:rendering && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run check:routes && npm run check:sitemap && npm run check:structured-data && npm run check:migration && npm run check:service-evidence && npm run check:case-study-evidence && npm run check:service-template && npm run check:jam-remediation
scripts.build: npm run verify && npm run build:jam && node scripts/inject-jam.js && npm run build:seo && npm run build:analytics && npm run check:release-quality && npm run validate:jam
